description_long: This is a large, rectangular-headed hammer with a metallic, weathered finish and intricate engravings along the edges of the head. One face of the hammer displays a blue triquetra symbol, while another face features a line of runic or stylized text. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in alternating dark and light bands, and ends in a looped leather strap for secure handling. The head appears solid and heavy, with beveled corners and a slightly rough, stone-like texture. The overall design is reminiscent of mythological or ceremonial hammers, suggesting both functional and symbolic use.
description: A heavy, engraved metal hammer with a blue triquetra symbol, runic text, and a banded handle ending in a leather strap.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the plain, engraved face of the head and the full length of the banded handle with its leather strap.
description_view_1: This view highlights the broad face of the hammer head, featuring a prominent blue triquetra symbol and detailed edge engravings.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the hammer head is visible, showing a plain face with ornate edge engravings and the handle below.
description_view_3: The hammer is shown from the rear, displaying a face with a line of runic or stylized text and the same detailed engravings along the edges.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with alternating dark and light bands, wrapped in leather, ending in a looped leather strap for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with beveled corners, engraved edges, one face with a blue triquetra symbol, and another with runic or stylized text.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Leather strap loop at the end of the handle
